TABLE.NAME: local_easycustmenu
TABLE.COMMENT: Stores local easy custom menu settings

FIELD.NAME: menu_link
FIELD.COMMENT: URL or path for the menu

FIELD.NAME: context_level
FIELD.COMMENT: Context level for the menu (site, course, etc.)

FIELD.NAME: depth
FIELD.COMMENT: Depth level of menu item, 0 = root

FIELD.NAME: menu_order
FIELD.COMMENT: Menu item order within the same depth

FIELD.NAME: condition_courses
FIELD.COMMENT: Assigned courses id(s), e.g., 2,3,4,5,6,7; if empty or 0, accessible in all courses

FIELD.NAME: condition_lang
FIELD.COMMENT: Assigned language code(s), e.g., ne,en; if empty, accessible in all languages

FIELD.NAME: condition_roleid
FIELD.COMMENT: Role ID(s) allowed to access; 0 means everyone; multiple roles stored as comma-separated e.g. 1,2,3

FIELD.NAME: timecreated
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix time when record was created

FIELD.NAME: timemodified
FIELD.COMMENT: Unix time when record was last modified
